otherRequirements: Visa-free entry for tourism for up to 90 days; to stay longer request an extension at a Moroccan police station
Passport must be valid for at least 3 months after your date of arrival
Make sure your passport is stamped on entry to avoid difficulties leaving
sourceNote: gov.uk Morocco travel advice — visa-free visits for tourism up to 90 days (https://www.gov.uk/foreign-travel-advice/morocco/entry-requirements)
